question: Which patients have a total invoiced amount above 1500? Include the value.
reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_id, SUM(i.total_amount) AS agg_value FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_id HAVING SUM(i.total_amount) > 1500

question: List every patient whose total invoiced amount is above 1500.
reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_id, SUM(i.total_amount) AS agg_value FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_id HAVING SUM(i.total_amount) > 1500

question: Find patients with total invoiced amount above 1500 and report it.
reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_id, SUM(i.total_amount) AS agg_value FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_id HAVING SUM(i.total_amount) > 1500

question: Which customers have a total purchase value over 2000? Include the value.
reference_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * pr.unit_price) AS agg_value FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN products pr ON oi.product_id = pr.product_id GROUP BY c.customer_id HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * pr.unit_price) > 2000

question: Find pitchers (8 or more 25-start seasons ) whose average strikeouts per full season is at least 200.
reference_sql: SELECT playerID, AVG(SO) FROM Pitching WHERE GS >= 25 GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(SO) >= 200 AND COUNT(*) >= 8

question: Show pitchers meeting both: 8+ 25-start seasons  and average strikeouts per full season at least 200.
reference_sql: SELECT playerID, AVG(SO) FROM Pitching WHERE GS >= 25 GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(SO) >= 200 AND COUNT(*) >= 8

question: Which franchises in 2000-2019 have average wins at least 90 across at least 15 seasons?
reference_sql: SELECT franchID, AVG(W) FROM Teams WHERE yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2019 GROUP BY franchID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 15

question: List franchises with average wins at least 90, requiring 15+ seasons in 2000-2019.
reference_sql: SELECT franchID, AVG(W) FROM Teams WHERE yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2019 GROUP BY franchID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 15

question: Find franchises (15 or more seasons in 2000-2019) whose average wins is at least 90.
reference_sql: SELECT franchID, AVG(W) FROM Teams WHERE yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2019 GROUP BY franchID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 15

question: Show franchises meeting both: 15+ seasons in 2000-2019 and average wins at least 90.
reference_sql: SELECT franchID, AVG(W) FROM Teams WHERE yearID BETWEEN 2000 AND 2019 GROUP BY franchID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 15

question: Which managers  have average wins per full season at least 90 across at least 10 100-game seasons?
reference_sql: SELECT playerID, AVG(W) FROM Managers WHERE G >= 100 GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 10

question: List managers with average wins per full season at least 90, requiring 10+ 100-game seasons .
reference_sql: SELECT playerID, AVG(W) FROM Managers WHERE G >= 100 GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 10

reference_sql: SELECT playerID, AVG(W) FROM Managers WHERE G >= 100 GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 10

question: Show managers meeting both: 10+ 100-game seasons  and average wins per full season at least 90.
reference_sql: SELECT playerID, AVG(W) FROM Managers WHERE G >= 100 GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(W) >= 90 AND COUNT(*) >= 10

question: Which territorys have sales total above 15000000? Show the value.

question: Which subcategorys have average list price above 800? Show the value.
reference_sql: SELECT s.Name, AVG(p.ListPrice) FROM Product p JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE p.ListPrice > 0 GROUP BY s.Name HAVING AVG(p.ListPrice) > 800
